inline_comments: Resolves Slack thread targeting for replies and status indicators. @returns replyThreadTs - Thread timestamp for reply messages @returns statusThreadTs - Thread timestamp for status indicators (typing, etc.) @returns isThreadReply - true if this is a genuine user reply in a thread, false if thread_ts comes from a bot status message (e.g. typing indicator)

functions.name: resolveSlackThreadTargets
